hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,pathlib,runpy,sys; e='pre_tool_use'; roots=[os.environ.get(k) for k in ('STAGEFLOW_PLUGIN_ROOT','CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT','PLUGIN_ROOT','CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT')]; c=[pathlib.Path(r)/'scripts/stageflow_hook_check.py' for r in roots if r]; c+=list(pathlib.Path.home().glob('.codex/plugins/cache/**/stageflow*/**/scripts/stageflow_hook_check.py')); c=[p for p in c if p.is_file()]; p=max(c,key=lambda x:x.stat().st_mtime,default=None); p is None and (sys.stderr.write('Stageflow hook: checker not found; skipping hook.\\n'), sys.exit(0)); sys.argv=[str(p),'--event',e]; runpy.run_path(str(p),run_name='__main__')" || py -3 -c "import os,pathlib,runpy,sys; e='pre_tool_use'; roots=[os.environ.get(k) for k in ('STAGEFLOW_PLUGIN_ROOT','CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT','PLUGIN_ROOT','CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT')]; c=[pathlib.Path(r)/'scripts/stageflow_hook_check.py' for r in roots if r]; c+=list(pathlib.Path.home().glob('.codex/plugins/cache/**/stageflow*/**/scripts/stageflow_hook_check.py')); c=[p for p in c if p.is_file()]; p=max(c,key=lambda x:x.stat().st_mtime,default=None); p is None and (sys.stderr.write('Stageflow hook: checker not found; skipping hook.\\n'), sys.exit(0)); sys.argv=[str(p),'--event',e]; runpy.run_path(str(p),run_name='__main__')" || python -c "import os,pathlib,runpy,sys; e='pre_tool_use'; roots=[os.environ.get(k) for k in ('STAGEFLOW_PLUGIN_ROOT','CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT','PLUGIN_ROOT','CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT')]; c=[pathlib.Path(r)/'scripts/stageflow_hook_check.py' for r in roots if r]; c+=list(pathlib.Path.home().glob('.codex/plugins/cache/**/stageflow*/**/scripts/stageflow_hook_check.py')); c=[p for p in c if p.is_file()]; p=max(c,key=lambda x:x.stat().st_mtime,default=None); p is None and (sys.stderr.write('Stageflow hook: checker not found; skipping hook.\\n'), sys.exit(0)); sys.argv=[str(p),'--event',e]; runpy.run_path(str(p),run_name='__main__')"
